/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libturtle_controller__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libturtle_controller__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/turtle_controller__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/turtle_controller/msg/detail/robot_status__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/turtle_controller__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/turtle_controller/msg/detail/robot_cmd__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/turtle_controller__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/turtle_controller/msg/detail/directional_distance__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
